content:
Advertisement for Teaching Posts | Maharaja Suhel Dev University, Azamgarh, Uttar Pradesh

Online applications are invited for the regular posts of Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor in different teaching departments of the University.

Advertisement No.: 03/2025

Last Date for Online Application: 20 July 2026

Last Date for Submission of Hard Copy (by Registered Post): 27 July 2026 (05:00 PM)

SAMARTH Portal: https://lnkd.in/ewGwvUNh

Official Website: https://msdu.ac.in/⁠
comment: Online + hard copy submission by post can disadvantage candidates facing postal delays; clear receipt confirmation on SAMARTH would reduce ambiguity in eligibility
